text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
So you have come, Doto, to the castle that
crowns the sacred ground where my love for
opera beats strongest—the Takurazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
You are Cinderella, waiting for her dance at the
castle, her evil stepsisters (the other racers) rife
with envy!

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Will I, the lord of the castle, claim victory? Will
the princess? Or perhaps... those evil stepsisters?

text_block_list.name: Legendary Bard
text_block_list.text:
Now, the royal drama of the Takarazuka Kinen
begins!
